Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'gpsTrack'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [isRecording, settings.autoStopMinutes, recorder, gpsTrack]

messages.message: The ref value 'contactMarkers.current' will likely have changed by the time this effect cleanup function runs. If this ref points to a node rendered by React, copy 'contactMarkers.current' to a variable inside the effect, and use that variable in the cleanup function.
React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'loadData' and 'placeMeMarker'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [loadData, placeMeMarker]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'loadData' and 'loading'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [rangeKey, activeCats, contentLevel, radiusKm, loading, loadData]

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [loading, rangeKey, activeCats, showHeatmap, radiusKm, loadData]

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [user, user.id]
